name: socialmgmt
description: Monorepo: panel zarządzania social media (React + Express + Prisma)
author: Maxsoft

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build -w server && playwright test
